hypothesis_en: Mr President, we have finished the round of speeches. I have to call the scrutinisers to the table. I ask all of them to go to their polls. The European Parliament has adopted a resolution on the situation in the Mediterranean. I would like to ask the Commission to take the necessary steps to ensure that the European Parliament's elections are conducted as soon as possible. Mr. Patrick Lewis, please, as soon as possible to your ballot box. Mrs. Lulling, please. At the tables where there are scrutinizers you can start voting The vote is open, there are scrutinizers at all the tables, you can start voting.
reference_en: thank you very much we've now heard from all the speakers from the groups I now have to call forward the tellers and I'd like to ask all of them now (1.41) to come forward (2.59) or perhaps better go t= directly to your ballot boxes Patrick Louis to ballot box A to B István Pálfi to ballot box C to E Justas Vincas Paleckis to ballot box F to H Daniel Hannan ballot box I to L Pier Luigi Bersani ballot box M to O Marie Panayotopoulos-Cassiotou ballot box P to R Joseph Muscat ballot box S Astrid Lulling ballot box T to Z (1.23) now obviously we can't begin to vote until the tellers are in station at their ballot boxes (2.21) so we have to make sure that the tellers ar= are present next to their ballot boxes before we vote can we just make sure that that is the case please (1.9) tellers please go to your ballot boxes as soon as possible as I said A to B Patrick Louis C to E István Pálfi (1.72) ((x)) ((President starts speaking in Spanish)) el Señor Patrick Louis ((President stops speaking)) Patrick Louis please g= go to your ballot box as soon as possible ((President starts speaking in Spanish)) -emos u= ((President stops speaking)) where else do we need tellers please at A to B ((x)) ((President starts speaking in Spanish)) la Señora (3.27) Lulling ((President stops speaking)) Mrs (1.02) Lulling Astrid Lulling (1.76) ((President starts speaking in Spanish)) Astrid Lulling (1.56) ((President stops speaking)) ((President starts speaking in French)) non Señora Lulling Madame (1.39) Lull= Madame Lulling vous entendez d'accord ((x)) en las mesas donde haya es= ((President stops speaking)) (1.96) so when the tellers are present you can start casting your ballots ((President starts speaking in French and Spanish)) mais on vous a appelé depuis longtemps el voto está abierto ((President stops speaking)) right the ballot is open (2.14) we have tellers (1.41) present at all the ballot boxes you can begin
source_es: muchas gracias hemos terminado el turno de oradores tengo que llamar a la mesa a los escrutadores les ruego a todos ellos (1.07) que se dirijan a sus urnas Patrick Louis a la urna A B ~Itchván Pálfi urna C E (1.06) Justas Vincas Paleckis urna F H Daniel Hannan urna I L (1.4) Luigi Bersani urna M O Marie Panayotopoulos-Cassiotou urna P R Joseph Muscat urna S Astrid Lulling urna T Z es evidente que no podremos empezar a votar hasta que los escrutadores estén en las urnas de manera que es imprescindible ver si contamos con la presencia de los escrutadores vamos a verificar que están en las urnas ruego a los escrutadores que se dirijan a las urnas cuanto antes urna A B Patrick Louis urna C E ~Itchván Pálfi el Señor Patrick Louis por favor Patrick Louis cuanto antes a su urna tenemos urna dónde no nos= dónde nos quedan nos faltan escrutadores allí no A B ((x)) la Señora Lulling Astrid Lulling Astrid Lulling ((in French)) non Señora Lulling ((in French)) madame Lulling s'il vous plait madame Lulling vous entendez d'accord ((President starts speaking Spanish again)) en las mesas donde haya escrutadores pueden empezar a votar ((in French)) mais on vous a appelé depuis longtemps Madame ((stops speaking French)) el voto está abierto el voto está abierto hay escrutadores en todas las mesas puede empezarse a votar
